notes: Water Vitality bridge golden. One SL15 Calamitous Aquashade with Varuna/Varuna at 100% HP. The in-game panel showed Max HP 25425; this reference supplies ally_max_hp explicitly until the calculator computes Max HP internally. Validates Vitality formulas: EX Might = 25425 x 0.045% = 11.44, DEF = 25425 x 0.025% = 6.36, DMG Cap (Sp.) = 25425 x 0.01% = 2.54.
